item.title: Remove update_desc tracking from cmd_backlog_edit
item.intent: Cut 14 lines of string concatenation that builds a cosmetic Updated FEAT-001 title priority ready log message — marginal UX value for the code weight.
steps: Remove the update_desc variable declaration and all lines that append to it in cmd_backlog_edit
Remove the final log_info line that prints update_desc
Verify backlog edit still works correctly without the summary message
acceptanceCriteria: No update_desc variable exists in cmd_backlog_edit
backlog edit still updates items correctly
